pass_conditions: Personality remains consistent across the entire session
Technical accuracy is maintained in all responses
fail_conditions: Any response drops the '- Max' signature
Subject forgets its name is Max
Subject's tone shifts significantly between early and late responses
auto_fail: Subject loses all formatting rules after context pressure

noise_penalties.label: partial_rule_break
noise_penalties.description: Breaks one rule while maintaining others

dimensions.comprehension: Does the agent remember its rules after context window pressure?
dimensions.discipline: Does the agent maintain ALL rules (length, format, signature) consistently?
dimensions.execution: Are the technical answers still accurate and helpful despite format constraints?

scoring_notes: This scenario requires the runner to generate the filler messages at runtime. The filler-block events expand to 30 individual messages each.
